rules.description: Caption must be present in top document
rules.remediation_template: Add/repair caption block using caption registry and rerun packet assembly.

rules.description: Exhibit index required when exhibits are attached
rules.remediation_template: Generate ExhibitMatrix and include Exhibit Index in packet sequence.

rules.description: Proof of service/service section must be present
rules.remediation_template: Generate service block and attach proof of service.
